_comment: PlanAmendmentRequest with major severity + observed_failure trigger and a jury recommendation. Severity-correction (observed_failure→major) is consumer-side per PAR-2; this fixture exercises the well-formed combination.
proposed_delta: Phase-3 ramp execution failed under load; revise concurrency budget downward.
rationale: Three consecutive ramp attempts breached SLO at 30% above plan-stated concurrency.

recommended_paths.summary: Halve concurrency budget for phase-3 ramp.
recommended_paths.tradeoff: Throughput drops ~50% during ramp; SLO compliance restored.

recommended_paths.summary: Roll back to phase-2 ceiling and re-evaluate at next pulse.
recommended_paths.tradeoff: No phase-3 progress this cycle; safer.
